16.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk
[phrase] aloud, bleating, crackling, cry ([phrase] out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, [phrase] hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, [phrase] sing, sound, [phrase] spark, thun
16.dv: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;

16.kj: [idiom] all along, [idiom] all that is (there-) in, fill, ([idiom] that whereof...was) full, fulness, (hand-) full, multitude.
16.dv: rarely מְלוֹא; or מְלוֹ; (Ezekiel [41:8), from H4390 (מָלֵא);

16.kj: [idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.

17.gl: to send away, for, or out (in a great variety of applications)
17.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring (on the way), cast (away, out), conduct, [idiom] earnestly, forsake, give (up), grow long, lay, leave, let depart (down, go, loose), push away, put

17.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
17.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
17.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

17.gl: properly, a whisper, i.e. by implication, (in a good sense) a private prayer, (in a bad one) an incantation; concretely, an amulet
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
17.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

17.gl: to strike with a sting (as a serpent); figuratively, to oppress with interest on a loan
a viper (as thrusting out the tongue, i.e. hissing)
17.dv: from an unused root meaning to extrude;

18.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
18.kj: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom

19.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
19.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
19.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

19.kj: [phrase] aloud, bleating, crackling, cry ([phrase] out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, [phrase] hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, [phrase] sing, sound, [phrase] spark, thun
19.dv: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;

19.gl: a daughter (used in the same wide sense as other terms of relationship, literally and figuratively)
19.kj: apple (of the eye), branch, company, daughter, [idiom] first, [idiom] old, [phrase] owl, town, village.

19.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
19.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
19.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

19.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
emptiness or vanity; figuratively, something transitory and unsatisfactory; often used as an adverb
19.dv: or (rarely in the abs.) הֲבֵל; from H1891 (הָבַל);

20.gl: to cross over; used very widely of any transition (literal or figurative; transitive, intransitive, intensive, causative); specifically, to cover (in copulation)
20.kj: alienate, alter, [idiom] at all, beyond, bring (over, through), carry over, (over-) come (on, over), conduct (over), convey over, current, deliver, do away, enter, escape, fail, ge

20.gl: to end, whether intransitive (to cease, be finished, perish) or transitived (to complete, prepare, consume)
20.kj: accomplish, cease, consume (away), determine, destroy (utterly), be (when... were) done, (be an) end (of), expire, (cause to) fail, faint, finish, fulfil, [idiom] fully, [idiom] ha

20.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor
20.kj: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.

20.gl: severed, i.e. harvest (as reaped), the crop, the time, the reaper, or figuratively; also a limb (of a tree, or simply foliage)
harvest (as the crop), whether the product (grain or fruit) or the (dry) season

21.gl: to fasten upon; hence, to seize, be strong (figuratively, courageous, causatively strengthen, cure, help, repair, fortify), obstinate; to bind, restrain, conquer
21.kj: aid, amend, [idiom] calker, catch, cleave, confirm, be constant, constrain, continue, be of good (take) courage(-ous, -ly), encourage (self), be established, fasten, force, fortify

21.gl: a daughter (used in the same wide sense as other terms of relationship, literally and figuratively)
21.kj: apple (of the eye), branch, company, daughter, [idiom] first, [idiom] old, [phrase] owl, town, village.

21.gl: a fracture, figuratively, ruin; specifically, a solution (of a dream)
21.kj: affliction, breach, breaking, broken(-footed, -handed), bruise, crashing, destruction, hurt, interpretation, vexation.
break (down, off, in pieces, up), broken (-hearted), bring to the birth, crush, destroy, hurt, quench, [idiom] quite, tear, view (by mistake for H7663 (שָׂבַר)).

21.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
to be ashy, i.e. darkcolored; by implication, to mourn (in sackcloth or sordid garments)
21.kj: be black(-ish), be (make) dark(-en), [idiom] heavily, (cause to) mourn.

22.gl: to ascend, intransitively (be high) or actively (mount); used in a great variety of senses, primary and secondary, literal and figurative
22.kj: arise (up), (cause to) ascend up, at once, break (the day) (up), bring (up), (cause to) burn, carry up, cast up, [phrase] shew, climb (up), (cause to, make to) come (up), cut off,

22.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
22.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.

22.gl: a daughter (used in the same wide sense as other terms of relationship, literally and figuratively)
22.kj: apple (of the eye), branch, company, daughter, [idiom] first, [idiom] old, [phrase] owl, town, village.

22.gl: there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence
22.kj: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.
22.dv: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, H834 (אֲשֶׁר));

22.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
properly, to mend (by stitching), i.e. (figuratively) to cure
22.kj: cure, (cause to) heal, physician, repair, [idiom] thoroughly, make whole. See H7503 (רָפָה).
